title: Watch Configurator with Strap Swap
prompt:
Create an interactive 3D watch configurator using Three.js where users can swap watch straps and customize the watch appearance. Load the model 'ferrari.glb' using GLTFLoader as a decorative brand emblem displayed on a small pedestal beside the watch.

SCENE SETUP:
- Dark gradient background (top: #1a1a2e, bottom: #16213e)
- A 3D watch model constructed procedurally from Three.js primitives:
  - Watch case: CylinderGeometry (radius 1.2, height 0.4) with metallic material, centered at (0, 0, 0)
  - Watch face: CircleGeometry (radius 1.1) on top of the case, white color with hour markers (12 small spheres around the edge)
  - Watch crown: Small cylinder on the right side of the case (x=1.4)
  - Default strap: Two BoxGeometry pieces (width 0.8, height 2.5, depth 0.15) extending from top and bottom of watch case
- Load 'ferrari.glb' and place it at position (3.5, -1, 0) scaled to 0.5, on a small cylindrical pedestal
- Camera: PerspectiveCamera at (0, 2, 6) looking at origin
- Lights: One DirectionalLight at (5, 10, 5) intensity 1.0, one AmbientLight intensity 0.4, one PointLight at (-3, 3, 3) intensity 0.6
- OrbitControls enabled with damping, auto-rotate enabled at speed 2.0, min/max distance 4-10

STRAP OPTIONS (5 types):
1. 'leather' - Brown color (#8B4513), roughness 0.8, no metalness
2. 'metal' - Silver color (#C0C0C0), roughness 0.2, metalness 0.9
3. 'rubber' - Black color (#1a1a1a), roughness 0.9, no metalness
4. 'nato' - Green color (#2d5a27), roughness 0.7, no metalness
5. 'ceramic' - White color (#f0f0f0), roughness 0.3, metalness 0.3

CASE MATERIAL OPTIONS (3 types):
1. 'gold' - Color #FFD700, metalness 1.0, roughness 0.1
2. 'silver' - Color #C0C0C0, metalness 1.0, roughness 0.15
3. 'rosegold' - Color #B76E79, metalness 1.0, roughness 0.1

UI ELEMENTS:
- Title 'Watch Configurator' at top center, white text, font-size 24px
- Strap selector panel on the left side: 5 circular buttons (40px diameter each) with the strap colors, each with a tooltip label. Class 'strap-btn' and data-strap attribute with strap name. Active button gets a white border.
- Case material selector on the right side: 3 circular buttons (40px diameter) with case colors. Class 'case-btn' and data-case attribute. Active button gets a white border.
- Bottom center: A price display div with id 'price-display' showing the current configuration price
- Bottom right: 'Add to Cart' button with id 'add-to-cart-btn'
- A rotation toggle button with id 'rotation-toggle' that toggles auto-rotate on/off

PRICING:
- Base watch: $500
- Strap prices: leather=$50, metal=$120, rubber=$30, nato=$40, ceramic=$90
- Case prices: gold=$200, silver=$100, rosegold=$150
- Total = base + strap + case price, displayed as '$XXX'

STATE MANAGEMENT - Expose window.__3D_STATE__ with:
- currentStrap: string (default 'leather')
- currentCase: string (default 'silver')
- totalPrice: number (default 650 = 500+50+100)
- autoRotate: boolean (default true)
- cartItems: number (default 0)
- modelLoaded: boolean (set to true when ferrari.glb loads successfully)
- strapColor: string (hex color of current strap)
- caseColor: string (hex color of current case)
- cameraDistance: number (current camera distance from origin)
- watchVisible: boolean (true when watch mesh is in scene)

INTERACTIONS:
- Clicking a strap button swaps the strap material/color with a brief scale animation (strap scales to 0 then back to 1 over 300ms)
- Clicking a case button changes the watch case material
- Price updates immediately on any configuration change
- 'Add to Cart' increments cartItems and briefly flashes the button green
- Rotation toggle button toggles OrbitControls autoRotate
- Mouse wheel zoom updates cameraDistance in state

Update window.__3D_STATE__ in the animation loop for dynamic values (cameraDistance).
physics_constraints: Camera distance must remain between 4 and 10 units. Auto-rotate speed is 2.0 degrees/second when enabled. Strap swap animation takes ~300ms. All prices must be non-negative integers.
